compiled_state.title: Implement gate-2a-reversal-check.sh
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
Create plugins/dso/scripts/gate-2a-reversal-check.sh. The script:
- Accepts: file paths (positional args), --intent-aligned flag (boolean, passed by fix-bug when Gate 1a returned intent-aligned)
- If --intent-aligned -> emit gate signal triggered:false, exit 0 (suppressed)
- For each file: runs git log --oneline -20 to find recent intentional changes
- Compares working tree diff (git diff on those files) against recent commit diffs
- Detects reversals: if the proposed changes undo a recent commit's changes
- Recognizes revert-of-revert: commit messages matching "Revert.*Revert" -> NOT a reversal, evidence field notes detection
- Multi-file: if ANY file shows reversal -> triggered:true
- Emits gate signal JSON to stdout: gate_id "2a", signal_type "primary", triggered, evidence (commit hash + message), confidence
- Always exits 0 (signal in stdout). Exits non-zero only on internal error.
- Outside git repo: graceful exit 0 with triggered:false
- Uses bash + git only (no external deps)

Note: gate-signal-schema.md contract is created by story 4b97-bd9d (story-level dependency ensures it exists before this story executes).

TDD: GREEN — implement until Task 1 tests pass.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Script exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x plugins/dso/scripts/gate-2a-reversal-check.sh
- [ ] All RED tests pass
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-gate-2a-reversal-check.sh
- [ ] bash -n syntax check
  Verify: bash -n plugins/dso/scripts/gate-2a-reversal-check.sh

comments.body: AC amendment (gap analysis): Reversal detection algorithm must use line-level inversion — compare added lines in working tree diff against removed lines in recent commits (and vice versa). A reversal is detected when >50% of a recent commit's changed lines are inverted by the proposed fix. Document the threshold in a comment in the script.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 4/6: Script created and made executable ✓
